meaning: adj.使愤怒的,刺激的,气人的
examples: They also have the irritating habit of interrupting.
Nothing is more irritating than people who do not keep to the point.
EastEnders' executive producer Diederick Santer said he would be playing an "interesting, but possibly irritating character".
She says she finds it irritating that people are infantilized by specialists who try to answer for them.
